gatewayRequired: The OpenClaw Gateway needs to be running to use chat. It will start automatically, or you can start it from Settings.

welcome.title: LYClaw Chat
welcome.subtitle: What can I do for you
welcome.skillNotInstalled: Skill "{{name}}" is not installed yet. Default prompt filled — install it from Skill Plaza first.

taskPanel.title: Task Outline
taskPanel.emptyBody: Once a run starts, LYClaw will surface thinking, tool calls, and handoff states here.

composer.agentPickerTitle: Route the next message to another agent
composer.modelSwitchNote: Only affects this chat and persists when reopened

lyAuto.title: Auto
lyAuto.description: Auto-select the best model including DeepSeek, Qwen, and MiniMax.

sidebar.sessionSwitchBlockedWhilePreparing: The agent is preparing its first reply. Please wait before switching threads or starting a new chat.

errors.modelResponseTimeout: No assistant reply was received for a while, so this request was stopped. Check your network, AI provider settings, or try again later.
errors.modelResponseTimeoutLong: No assistant reply was received after a long wait, so this request was stopped. The model may still be queued or warming up, the provider may be unavailable or rate-limited, or the AI provider settings may be incorrect. Check Settings → AI Providers or switch models, then try again.
errors.contextTooLarge: This conversation is too large. Automatic compression still exceeds the current model limit. Use stronger compression, switch to a larger-context model, or start a new chat.
errors.currentMessageTooLarge: This message is too long for the current model's safe context budget. Split the input or provide the content as a file/attachment.
errors.contextCompressionFailedRecentOnly: Context compression failed. Only recent conversation turns were kept for this request; earlier history was not included.
